code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut acc = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
        have = true
      else if b == 45 and not have
        neg = true
      else
        if have
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -acc)
          else
            result = list.push(result, acc)
          end
          have = false
          neg = false
          acc = 0
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -acc)
    else
      result = list.push(result, acc)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        return Some(mid)
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      return None
    end
  end
  None
end

fn run() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let xs = parse_ints(line1)
      let ts = parse_ints(line2)
      match ts.get(0)
      when Some(t)
        match bsearch(xs, t)
        when Some(i)
          println("index=#{i}")
        when None
          println("not_found")
        end
      when None
        println("not_found")
      end
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end

run()
